The front desk was warm and handled check-in quickly. For a city stay, the hotel worked very well.

reviews.hotel_name: The Robey, Chicago, a Member of Design Hotels
reviews.title: Polished stay
reviews.text: I chose The Robey, Chicago, a Member of Design Hotels because I wanted to be in Wicker Park. The hotel details, including rooftop lounges, outdoor pool, fitness center and five restaurants, gave the stay a polished feel. The room felt clean when we arrived, and the bathroom looked freshly serviced. The bed was comfortable, and the room layout worked well for unpacking and relaxing. For a city stay, the hotel worked very well.

reviews.title: Strong city stay
reviews.text: I chose The Robey, Chicago, a Member of Design Hotels because I wanted to be in Wicker Park. The King Room, 330 sq ft matched the listing and made a clear first impression.
